headline: Billionaire Chase Coleman Is Betting Big on These 4 Growth Stocks

headline: Nvidia Is 'Not A Car,' Jensen Huang Says, Defending Its Hard-To-Replace AI Ecosystem
summary: In a podcast posted Wednesday with Dwarkesh Patel, Nvidia Corp CEO Jensen Huang dismissed the idea that AI hardware is becoming a commodity. Huang described Nvidia's core mission as an "incredible journey" of transforming electrons into valuable digital tokens. "The amount of artistry, engineering, science, and invention that goes into making that token valuable… is far from deeply understood," Huang stated. He pushed back against the notion that Nvidia is simply a software company using Taiwan

content.title: Nvidia Is 'Not A Car,' Jensen Huang Says, Defending Its Hard-To-Replace AI Ecosystem
content.summary: In a podcast posted Wednesday with Dwarkesh Patel, Nvidia Corp CEO Jensen Huang dismissed the idea that AI hardware is becoming a commodity. Huang described Nvidia's core mission as an "incredible journey" of transforming electrons into valuable digital tokens. "The amount of artistry, engineering, science, and invention that goes into making that token valuable… is far from deeply understood," Huang stated. He pushed back against the notion that Nvidia is simply a software company using Taiwan
